gold_change_reason: Added content-based format detection, malformed line skipping with warning, and flux bound validation (lower <= upper) to original seed solution.
covered_requirements: Add constraint that lower bound must be <= upper bound; raise ValueError otherwise.
Extend format detection to rely on file content when extension is ambiguous or unknown.
Add executable case that tests parsing of .dat file with TSV content.
Require robustness to malformed lines (extra columns, missing fields) in TSV files while still yielding valid entries.
Add executable case that tests parsing of TSV with malformed line.
Add executable case that tests validation of flux bounds and raises ValueError when violated.
implementation_notes: New function detect_format_from_content reads first line to determine TSV or YAML.
parse_exchange_table_file and parse_exchange_yaml_file now log a warning when skipping malformed lines.
Bounds validation (lower <= upper) enforced in parse_exchange_file after yielding from sub-parsers; raises ValueError with compound name if violated.
Existing resolve_format unchanged; content detection used when extension is unknown.
